noticia.titulo: HNN Interview: Anthony Masi (Beyond Killer Games)
noticia.texto_resumido: HNN Interview: Anthony Masi (Beyond Killer Games) by Matt Boiselle We recently had the chance to sit down for a few and chat with Anthony Masi, the owner of Beyond Killer Games, who also works as a documentary and film producer, whose most recent work included the “Silent Night Deadly Night” remake, and get this: … The post HNN Interview: Anthony Masi (Beyond Killer Games) appeared first on Horror News | HNN .
